# Peter Farrar Books
> Author of photography and leadership books based in Basingstoke, Hampshire, UK.

## About
Peter Farrar is a published author, professional photographer and leadership expert. His books cover portrait and landscape photography education and leadership culture in the workplace.

## Books
- Leadership – The Culture Fix: A leadership and workplace culture guide for managers and leaders
- The Complete Photography Field Guide: A comprehensive guide to photography techniques and practice
- Mastering Digital Photography Series (Books 1–3): Photography education series

## Blog
Photography techniques, leadership insights and book updates at peterfarrarbooks.com/blog

## Categories
- Photography: technique, composition, film, landscape, portrait
- Leadership & Culture: management, workplace culture, leadership development

## Website
- Homepage: https://www.peterfarrarbooks.com/
- Books: https://www.peterfarrarbooks.com/books
- Blog: https://www.peterfarrarbooks.com/blog
- About: https://www.peterfarrarbooks.com/about
- Contact: https://www.peterfarrarbooks.com/contact
